                    enhanced_np = (

                # Concatenate all sub-batches
                enhanced_np = np.concatenate(all_enhanced_np, axis=0)

                # DEBUG: save first 3 enhanced frames on Python side

                os.makedirs("/tmp/dorea_debug_py", exist_ok=True)

                    _DebugImage.fromarray(enhanced_np[di]).save(f"/tmp/dorea_debug_py/enh_{di}.png")
                    print(f"[dorea-inference] DEBUG: saved /tmp/dorea_debug_py/enh_{di}.png shape={enhanced_np[di].shape} dtype={enhanced_np[di].dtype}", file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
